# portkey_workspace_security_settings (Resource)

Manages the role-permission flags (security_settings) on a Portkey workspace. Every flag is Optional+Computed: omit a flag to keep its current API value. Because the Portkey API requires the full 35-field object on every PUT, the provider reads the current settings and overlays any user-specified values before writing. Destroying this resource removes it from Terraform state ONLY; the underlying API settings are left untouched (Portkey has no endpoint to reset them).

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String) ID (slug) of the workspace whose security settings are being managed.

### Optional

- `managers_update_ws` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can update workspace-level settings.
- `managers_view_all_data` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view all data in the workspace.
- `managers_view_analytics` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view workspace analytics.
- `managers_view_api_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view API keys.
- `managers_view_configs` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view configs.
- `managers_view_guardrails` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view guardrails.
- `managers_view_log_metadata` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view request log metadata.
- `managers_view_logs` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view request logs.
- `managers_view_prompts` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view prompts.
- `managers_view_virtual_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can view virtual keys (providers).
- `managers_write_api_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update API keys.
- `managers_write_configs` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update configs.
- `managers_write_guardrails` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update guardrails.
- `managers_write_mcp_servers` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update MCP server integrations.
- `managers_write_prompts` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update prompts.
- `managers_write_virtual_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can create or update virtual keys (providers).
- `managers_write_ws_integrations` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can manage workspace-level integrations.
- `managers_write_ws_mcp_integrations` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can manage workspace-level MCP integrations.
- `managers_write_ws_users` (Boolean) Whether workspace managers can add, remove, or update workspace members.
- `members_view_all_data` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view all data in the workspace (not just their own).
- `members_view_analytics` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view workspace analytics.
- `members_view_api_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view API keys.
- `members_view_configs` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view configs.
- `members_view_guardrails` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view guardrails.
- `members_view_log_metadata` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view request log metadata.
- `members_view_logs` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view request logs.
- `members_view_prompts` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view prompts.
- `members_view_virtual_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can view virtual keys (providers).
- `members_write_api_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can create or update API keys.
- `members_write_configs` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can create or update configs.
- `members_write_guardrails` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can create or update guardrails.
- `members_write_prompts` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can create or update prompts.
- `members_write_virtual_keys` (Boolean) Whether workspace members can create or update virtual keys (providers).
- `organisation_admins_view_log_metadata` (Boolean) Whether organisation admins can view request log metadata in this workspace.
- `organisation_admins_view_logs` (Boolean) Whether organisation admins can view request logs in this workspace.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (equals workspace_id).
